{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032112503087E2BB94E80E796424DF\"}"},"total":5670},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6864472555458215947","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是本不错舒适的神豪都市文！ 题材不算新颖，开头写的不错，没有和女友分手的套路，内容不是很新颖，但比较有趣，看着舒服，剧情发展比较缓慢，看点多，元素多，后面可能会涉及很多职业，喜欢快节奏的建议不看，文笔比较稚嫩，有些地方运用不是很好，但还是比较不错，至少现在没有看着不舒服的地方，细节描写不多不少，没有烦躁的感觉，人物描写的不错，每个人的性格特点突出比较明显，希望后面不要写修仙，给主角提高体质和武力就可以了，可以往科技发展。 主角：不圣母，不无脑，比较聪明，有时随和，对敌人不圣母。系统：不是很新颖，但功能全能，比较人性化，就是不爱说话，希望后期不要虐主。 作者大大！不要烂尾！不要停更！不要虐文！提高质量的同时也要加快更新速度。(ง •̀_•́)ง٩(•̤̀ᵕ•̤́๑)ᵒᵏᵎᵎᵎᵎ"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1598259569,"group_id":"6854758793243266051","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"手握日月摘星辰，世间无我这般人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzFK2c6Ouxr1u/g62/U1rLI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3f42a3d252c446ee8e3c5ae5c33d249a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776624379\u0026x-signature=r9w7Diqw071%2B4GXuna9%2BsoXmG%2Fc%3D","user_id":"153550346262811","user_name":"凯哥大大"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"153550346262811","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717304361,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6854758793243266051","book_info":{"abstract":"【半日常，单女主】天降系统，苏来从此走上开挂人生！不会玩电脑？放心！把你培养成黑客大神！做菜太难吃？问题不大，奖励你精湛厨艺！打游戏一直送人头？别慌，电竞大神的名头是你的！……记者：请问您怎么样才能赚到一个亿？苏来：一个亿？等等啊，三，二，一，好了，一个亿赚到了。记者风中凌乱。【系统爸爸，我要学飙车】【只要你点进去看几章，就会发现本书是不一样的神豪】【故事发生在平行世界，请勿对号入座】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9ae03b4032c3055e9529babeaa9714ff~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱喝白开水呐","author_id":"","book_id":"6854758793243266051","book_name":"都市：从黑客开始成为完美神豪","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6484人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":20,\"name\":\"神豪\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20\u0026name=神豪\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":389,\"name\":\"单女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389\u0026name=单女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":522,\"name\":\"打脸\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522\u0026name=打脸\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":850,\"name\":\"无脑爽\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850\u0026name=无脑爽\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":838,\"name\":\"无后宫\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838\u0026name=无后宫\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6854759569353081357","read_count":"6484","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"608205"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"282","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,单女主,打脸,无脑爽,魂穿,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-si
